TextView.android:text:
Weekly Goals

1. Exercise 4 Times This Week
Plan and commit to at least 4 workout sessions.

2. Drink 2L of Water Daily
Stay hydrated every single day this week.

3. Sleep 7–8 Hours Each Night
Prioritize rest for better recovery and focus.

4. Eat 3 Healthy Meals a Day
Avoid skipping meals and choose nutritious options.

5. Meditate for 10 Minutes Daily
Start or end your day with a short meditation.

6. Reduce Screen Time
Limit phone use to protect your mental well-being.

7. Walk 7,000 Steps a Day
Stay active throughout the day with regular walks.

8. Cook at Home 5 Days
Home-cooked meals are healthier and budget-friendly.

9. Read or Learn Something New
Dedicate 15 minutes daily to personal growth.

10. Reflect on Your Week
Every Sunday, review what went well and what to improve.
